---
title: "Classroom to Court"
subtitle: "Where basketball knowledge meets data-driven insight"
---

## Welcome

Basketball has always been more than a game — it's a laboratory of strategy, athleticism, and storytelling. **Classroom to Court** bridges the gap between the academic study of sport and the hardwood itself, turning raw statistics into narratives that every fan can appreciate.

Whether you follow the high-stakes drama of March Madness or track every NBA standings shift across an 82-game season, this site gives you something most coverage doesn't: the numbers behind the moments. Every chart, every breakdown, and every post here is built from real game-by-game data — no filler, no recycled takes, just basketball and the statistics that explain it.

---

## Explore the Content

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 1.5rem 0;">

  <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 240px; background: #f4f6fa; border-radius: 10px;
              border-top: 4px solid #0a1628; padding: 1.4rem 1.6rem;
              box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(10,22,40,0.08);">
    <h3 style="margin-top:0; color:#0a1628;">🏀 NCAA</h3>
    <p style="color:#374151; font-size:0.95rem;">Dive into college basketball with game-by-game breakdowns, team efficiency reports, and player spotlights.</p>
    <a href="duke-blue-devils.html" style="color:#1a3a6b; font-weight:600; text-decoration:none;">
      Duke Blue Devils 2025–26 →
    </a>
  </div>

  <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 240px; background: #f4f6fa; border-radius: 10px;
              border-top: 4px solid #e8a020; padding: 1.4rem 1.6rem;
              box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(10,22,40,0.08);">
    <h3 style="margin-top:0; color:#0a1628;">🏆 NBA</h3>
    <p style="color:#374151; font-size:0.95rem;">Explore how team statistics translate into wins across the NBA, with visualizations that reveal what the box score misses.</p>
    <a href="nbastatsandwinpct.html" style="color:#1a3a6b; font-weight:600; text-decoration:none;">
      NBA Stats & Win % →
    </a>
  </div>

</div>
```

---

## Connect

Stay up to date and connect with the community:

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin: 1rem 0 1.5rem;">

  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com" target="_blank"
     style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem; background:#0a66c2; color:#fff;
            padding:0.6rem 1.2rem; border-radius:8px; text-decoration:none;
            font-weight:600; font-size:0.92rem; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(10,22,40,0.15);">
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white">
      <path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136
               1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85
               3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433a2.062
               2.062 0 0 1-2.063-2.065 2.064 2.064 0 1 1 2.063 2.065zm1.782
               13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0
               1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227
               24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z"/>
    </svg>
    Follow on LinkedIn
  </a>

</div>
```

---

## Latest Basketball News

Stay current with live posts from the top basketball accounts on X:

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 0.5rem;">

  <!-- ESPN NBA feed -->
  <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 280px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px;
              overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(10,22,40,0.08);">
    <div style="background: #0a1628; color: #fff; padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
                font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
                border-bottom: 3px solid #e8a020;">
      🏆 @ESPNNBA
    </div>
    <a class="twitter-timeline"
       data-height="480"
       data-theme="light"
       data-chrome="noheader nofooter noborders"
       href="https://twitter.com/ESPNNBA">
      Tweets by ESPNNBA
    </a>
  </div>

  <!-- ESPN CBB feed -->
  <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 280px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px;
              overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(10,22,40,0.08);">
    <div style="background: #0a1628; color: #fff; padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
                font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
                border-bottom: 3px solid #e8a020;">
      🏀 @ESPN_CBB
    </div>
    <a class="twitter-timeline"
       data-height="480"
       data-theme="light"
       data-chrome="noheader nofooter noborders"
       href="https://twitter.com/ESPN_CBB">
      Tweets by ESPN_CBB
    </a>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- X/Twitter widget script — loads the embeds above -->
<script async src="https://platform.twitter.com/widgets.js" charset="utf-8"></script>
```
